jobs.name: Morning briefing
jobs.description: Assistant spawns social-agent for digest, posts to #general at 7am.

payload.message: Morning briefing. Fetch today's calendar events via gog. Spawn social-agent with calendar data and pending tasks from memory. Vet the digest. Post to integrations.discordGeneralChannelId.

jobs.name: Fitness daily check-in
jobs.description: Fitness coach builds plan if not done today, spawns assistant to post to #fitness.

payload.message: Daily fitness check-in (America/Los_Angeles). If coaching.fitness.lastDailyPlanDate is not today: build workout + diet plan, spawn assistant (personal ops only: post fitness-chart, update lastDailyPlanDate). If already planned today: return CHECKIN_DONE.

jobs.name: Weekday productivity digest
jobs.description: Assistant fetches calendar, spawns productivity-agent for daily schedule digest Mon–Fri.

payload.message: Weekday digest. Fetch today's calendar events via gog. Spawn productivity-agent with calendar data and pending tasks from memory. Vet result. Post to integrations.discordGeneralChannelId (or #productivity if configured).

jobs.name: Finance weekly summary
jobs.description: Finance agent reviews spending and alerts every Monday at 9am.

payload.message: Weekly finance review. Run budget-review and finance-alert. Spawn assistant to post summary to Discord. If ALERT_NONE and no notable changes: post summary only.

jobs.name: Weekly reading recommendation
jobs.description: Learning agent surfaces 3–5 new resources every Sunday at 6pm.

payload.message: Weekly reading recommendation. Use reading-list skill: find 3–5 new resources on currentTopics via web-search. Add to reading list file. Spawn assistant to post to Discord.
